sourceMovie.title: The Professor
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: The Professor (2018) stuck because it commits to its comedy premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Wayne Roberts's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The comedy and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Saltburn
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Professor clicked for you, Saltburn (2023) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and drama, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Professor?
faq.answer: Try Saltburn, Irrational Man, A Serious Man—each shares DNA with The Professor while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Professor?
faq.answer: The Professor (2018) is best described as Comedy, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Professor worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.8/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
